title: AI glasses help students cheat in exams – test-obsessed Asia is ground zero
abstract: AI glasses help students cheat in exams – test-obsessed Asia is ground zero may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools o...
abstract_zh: AI眼镜助考，亚洲考生直呼“作弊自由”！在这场考试热潮中，你只需轻轻一戴，答案瞬间浮现眼前。技术宅们终于可以名正言顺地“精确作弊”，让监考老师欲哭无泪。毕竟，在这片土地上，连作弊都能玩出新高度。
